raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a computer with two service memberships for one year. I only had them for a year. One of the memberships was cancelled correctly while the other stay active. I was not aware of the activity until my credit score dropped XXXX points because i did not pay the balance. I was not aware the balance was that as i have received many fraud emails that look like best buy/XXXX. I have not made any purchases at best buy since such computer and i assumed it was fraud. 

Best Buy Credit Card charged me for a membership that i canceled with the other one i had. As i have received many fraud emails resembling best buy, i ignored it. I incurred in late fees, and now my credit score via XXXX  dropped by XXXX points which it is significant. 

Date of charge : XX/XX/XXXX for {$100.00} Membership was sold via a new computer for a purchase in XXXX. That membership was not to be auto renewal but credit card charged me anyway in XXXX. 
Dispute with credit card was raised.
